subject: Unable to log in to the system
description: Login fails despite entering the correct password

comments.author: agent_a@company.com
comments.text: Hello, we have received your report and are investigating

comments.author: agent_a@company.com
comments.text: Issue resolved; it was caused by an expired password

subject: Data synchronization delay
description: Data synchronization is delayed by over 1 hour

comments.author: agent_b@company.com
comments.text: Confirmed the synchronization delay issue; working on it

comments.author: agent_b@company.com
comments.text: Sync queue has been cleared; service restored to normal

subject: Report displays blank page
description: Monthly sales report shows a blank page when opened

comments.author: agent_a@company.com
comments.text: Thank you for the report; let me look into the issue

comments.author: agent_a@company.com
comments.text: It was a cache issue; now fixed

subject: API call returns 403
description: API calls using the API key return 403 Forbidden

comments.author: agent_c@company.com
comments.text: The API key permission scope was misconfigured; corrected now

subject: Mobile app crash
description: iOS app crashes when opening a specific page

comments.author: agent_b@company.com
comments.text: Thank you for the report; we are reproducing the issue

comments.author: agent_b@company.com
comments.text: Reproduced the issue; submitted to the development team for a fix

comments.author: agent_a@company.com
comments.text: Hello, we are testing the file upload function

comments.author: agent_a@company.com
comments.text: The Nginx configuration was limiting the upload size; increased to 50MB
